mapper.insert: insert into member_card_order (order_no, member_card_id, member_id, member_no, member_name, member_phone, card_type_id, card_type_name, valid_days, receivable_amount, paid_amount, payment_type, order_status, pay_time, dept_id, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, remark, created_at, updated_at, is_del) values (#{orderNo}, #{memberCardId}, #{memberId}, #{memberNo}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{cardTypeId}, #{cardTypeName}, #{validDays}, #{receivableAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{paymentType}, #{orderStatus}, #{payTime}, #{deptId}, #{createStaffId}, #{createStaffName}, #{remark}, now(), now(), 0)
mapper.update: update member_card_order set member_card_id = #{memberCardId}, updated_at = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and is_del = 0
mapper.select: select * from member_card_order where order_no = #{orderNo} and is_del = 0
select * from member_card_order where member_card_id = #{memberCardId} and is_del = 0 limit 1
